**What is it?**
<!-- Species name, hat name, or landscape feature name -->

**ASCII art**

```
(paste the art here, using `o` as the placeholder for {e} eyes if it's a species)
```

**Type**
- [ ] Species (must include `theme` stats + a `mini` one-line face + 5 cute names)
- [ ] Hat (must include the multi-row art; bottom row sits ON the head)
- [ ] Landscape feature (tree / bush / grass / flower)

**Attribution**
<!-- If this is your own design: "original by @your-handle".
     If adapted from elsewhere: paste the source URL + original artist if known. -->

**For species: which rarity tier?**
<!-- Common / Uncommon / Rare / Epic / Legendary -->
